title: 3 Signs You Have a Poor Money Mindset

segments.text: Feeling guilty about spending is a sign of shame.
But this mindset can be transformed with growth.
You constantly worry about money, instead of planning.
And you avoid investing due to fear of loss.
These patterns keep you stuck in survival mode.
Follow for the money mindset they don't teach you.

description: Spot these signs to shift your money mindset. Follow for daily money wisdom! 💰
